title: Alex's Classic Caves (Alex's Caves Programmer Art Compat)
description: makes the textures of Alex's Caves & a few of it's addons fit in with programmer art
body:
ANY TEXTURES FROM POST 1.12 VERSIONS ARE FROM [PACP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp)
A MAJORITY OF TEXTURES IN THE CANDY CAVERN ARE TAKEN FROM 4J STUDIO'S HALLOWEEN, FESTIVE & CANDY MASHUP PACKS!!!!!!!

Modifies a large amount of the textures from Alex's Caves to be more [reminiscent](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/reminiscence) (haha) of the textures from pre-jappa minecraft, and of minecraft mods before 2019/20/whenever minecraft got popular again

### PROGRESS:
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves):
  - Entities: 15%
  - Blocks: 75%
  - Items: 60%
- [Alex's Caves Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves-delight):
  - Items: 20%
- [Alex's Caves: Stuff & Torpedoes](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexscaves-torpedoes):
  - Entities: 0%
  - Blocks: 0%
  - Items: 0%
